features: SPRING ASSISTED OPEN DESIGN. We use the latest design on this 7 day pill box to achieve one-handed operation with the little rubber strips for the smart "lid spring open" feature. The lids are all beautifully colored and marked clearly with the date, everything is clear at a glance so you may find it easy to choose the pills you need. The medication box is quite nice for easy daily dispensing and big enough to hold 8 fish oils or 11 large vitamins (size of each compartment: 1.3"x1.18"x0.82").

SAY GOODBYE TO DUMPAGE PILLS. No worries about unwanted dumpage of pills found by pets and kids for your slightest unintentional or incidental touch on the pill boxes. The push button stays closed once locked and securely snap shut keeping pills safe. The tablet organiser is small and perfectly suitable for travel and is ideal for storing small jewelry or items such as earrings, beads, nail art tips, ect.

PREMIUM SCREEN PRINTING. To avoid screen-printing fonts and icons falling off from the surface of the medication organiser, we use high-end screen printing ink and strictly do the Ink Adhesion Test with 3M Tapes before shipment. Thus, you will not be frustrated by the missing fonts of "Tuesday" or icons of "PM", and never worry about taking the wrong tablets.

BPA-FREE MATERIALS. This pill dispenser is pretty safe because of being made of food grade materials. You would be worry-free with the BPA-free dosset box when storing multiple pill regimes inside. With the transparent plastic lid, The pill organizer is quite easy to use for distinguishing the pills in each dose without opening the lids.
WHAT YOU RECEIVE: 1 x AUVON Pill Boxes 7 Day 1 Times a Day, and friendly customer service.
